name: split-screen-day-night-europe
description: Create a left-right split comparison between normal globe imagery and a night-lights overlay over Southern Europe.
prompt: Set up a CesiumJS viewer centered on Italy and the surrounding Mediterranean region. Keep the default globe imagery on one side and add Earth at Night as a split-screen overlay on the left half of the viewport only. Set the split position to the center so the screenshot clearly shows a day-versus-night comparison across the same geography.
expected_behaviors: Uses SplitDirection.LEFT or RIGHT on an imagery layer
Uses a second imagery layer for the split overlay
visual_expectations: The viewer should show a clear vertical split, with Southern Europe visible on both sides. One half should show normal globe imagery and the other half should show the night-lights treatment.
